title: podman-kube@.service.in: Remove Restart=never option with typo
body:
systemd expects the value of the option to be `no` instead, but this is
already the default behavior. This fixes the following warning when
running `systemctl status` on the unit:

    Failed to parse service restart specifier, ignoring: never

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
podman-kube@.service.in: Remove Restart=never option with typo
```

comments.body:
This looks correct.  Although I think restart=no is the default. so it might not be needed at all.
LGTM
WIll wait for @vrothberg input.

> Although I think restart=no is the default. so it might not be needed at all.

Thanks. I took a look at the manpage and it seems that's indeed the case:

> If set to no (the default), the service will not be restarted

I'll update the PR to remove the option entirely.

EDIT: Done!

/approve
/lgtm
Since @vrothberg is out this week, I am going to merge this.  I believe it is correct.
